name: TERMINAL MYELOCYSTOCELE
definition: combination of posterior spina bifida + meningocele + tethered cord + hydromyelia + cystic

demographics.Associated with: anorectal + genitourinary + vertebral anomalies: anal atresia, cloacal

discriminating_features: spinal cord surrounded dorsally + ventrally by dilated subarachnoid space of the meningocele

general: spinal cord surrounded dorsally + ventrally by dilated subarachnoid space of the meningocele
